title: Black Tridents
body:
# 🔱 Black Trident

> A resource pack that retextures the Minecraft trident to a sleek, all-black style.


---

## ✨ Features

- Replaces the default trident texture with a clean, dark black variant
- Applies to both the held item and thrown trident


---

## 🤔 Why?

The default trident has a bulky, colorful texture that doesn't fit every playstyle or aesthetic. Black Trident gives it a minimal, dark look — cleaner, sharper, and more intimidating.

---
